CVE-2021-23358.title: The package underscore from 1.13.0-0 and before 1.13.0-2, from 1. ...
CVE-2021-23358.summary: The package underscore from 1.13.0-0 and before 1.13.0-2, from 1.3.2 and before 1.12.1 are vulnerable to Arbitrary Code Injection via the template function, particularly when a variable property is passed as an argument as it is not sanitized.
